svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD AppCode["Your Application Code
- Configure options
- Override lifecycle hooks
- Inject behaviors"] --> RetoldDataService["Retold Data Service
- Loads Stricture model
- Creates DAL per entity
- Creates MeadowEndpoints per entity
- Manages service lifecycle"] RetoldDataService --> Orator["Orator (API Server)
- HTTP server via Restify
- Route registration
- Request handling"] Orator --> MeadowEndpoints["Meadow Endpoints (REST Layer)
- CRUD route handlers
- Behavior injection hooks
- Session management
- Authorization enforcement"] MeadowEndpoints --> Meadow["Meadow (Data Access)
- Schema management
- Query building via FoxHound
- Provider-based query execution
- Audit stamping and soft deletes"] Meadow --> StorageProvider["Storage Provider
MySQL | SQLite | MSSQL | ALASQL"] ","style":"notebook"}
